layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first, generous spacing with bottom navigation bar. RTL direction.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Right-to-left layout. Text align right by default.
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Bottom navigation bar on mobile, standard header on desktop.

status_cards.note: RTL implies the accent border is on the right (border-r-4)

license_plate.container: flex flex-row-reverse items-stretch w-full max-w-sm mx-auto rounded-md overflow-hidden border-2 border-black/20 shadow-lg bg-plate-yellow
license_plate.blue_strip: bg-plate-blue w-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white font-bold p-2
license_plate.text: flex-1 text-center font-bold text-4xl tracking-widest text-black py-3 flex items-center justify-center font-sans
license_plate.direction: Must enforce LTR on the numbers so it reads correctly left-to-right despite RTL page direction. Apply dir='ltr' to the text container.

ambient_glow.primary: absolute top-0 right-[-10%] w-72 h-72 bg-accent-blue rounded-full mix-blend-screen filter blur-[128px] opacity-20 pointer-events-none
ambient_glow.secondary: absolute bottom-0 left-[-10%] w-72 h-72 bg-plate-yellow rounded-full mix-blend-screen filter blur-[128px] opacity-10 pointer-events-none

motion.staggered_fade: Framer Motion variants for staggered children reveal (initial opacity 0, y 20)
motion.counters: framer-motion useMotionValue and animate for social proof stats

hero_car_tech.description: Hero background - futuristic car tech silhouette

city_night_1.description: Background image for location-based search or marketing sections

city_night_2.description: Alternative background for blog or articles

modern_car.description: Featured car for blog or recent searches

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure <html dir='rtl' lang='he'> is set in the main document.
Import and use Rubik for headings and Heebo for body text (use Google Fonts).
Ensure .js files are used for React components (JSX syntax within .js is standard here, NOT .tsx).
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, cards) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-plate-btn').
Use Framer Motion for all staggered fade-ups and number counters.
Build a bottom navigation bar visible only on mobile screens (fixed to bottom).
Use a custom React component for the Israeli License Plate that visually mimics the yellow plate (#FFCC00) with the blue IL side strip (#003399). Keep numbers left-to-right by applying dir='ltr'.
Apply backdrop-blur to all primary cards to create the glassmorphism effect.
Add radial gradients for ambient glow behind main components to match the high-tech, glowing feel.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide, ensuring directional icons (like arrows) are flipped for RTL.
